## reference · OWASP Proactive Controls Secure Development Best Practices Handling

* The OWASP Top 10 Proactive Controls project aims to raise awareness about application security by describing key areas of concern for software developers.
* The target audience includes developers, development managers, product owners, Q/A professionals, program managers, and anyone involved in building software.
* Use the OWASP Proactive Controls as a foundation for introductory software security developer training.
* A fully secure development process should include:
  + Comprehensive requirements from a standard such as OWASP ASVS.
  + A range of software development activities described in maturity models like OWASP SAMM and BSIMM.
* The document is released under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International license.

Sources: https://owasp.org/www-project-proactive-controls/
